note: The labeled exemplar set rubric-check.py runs the spec-quality gate (bin/spec-quality-check.py) against, to PROVE the gate discriminates. The planted-defect specs (expect: fail) are the same fixtures the spec-review-calibration eval uses to prove the gate has teeth on each named dimension; the gate-clean specs (expect: pass) are that eval's council fixtures (mechanically sound; only a judgment defect a critic catches). Referenced by relative path — not copied — so the rubric's calibration and the eval's teeth proof can never drift. A hollow gate that waved a defect through would FAIL this meta-verification.
